summary: Duplicate DAE with no added value and poor reception
review: The sole reviewer condemns this file as a redundant digital extraction of an already circulating source and recommends its removal from the archive. No comments are made about the performance itself, leaving both musical and technical quality unaddressed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, rating 1 star, explicitly negative about the recording's usefulness; no positive aspects mentioned.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it a duplicate DAE and suggests deletion; implies no unique or superior audio quality.
